task_completion.description: Verify that the agent started a crawl of the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider application is open, the URL bar at the top contains 'https://books.toscrape.com/', and there is evidence of a crawl in progress or completed (e.g., a populated list of URLs in the main window, or a progress bar).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located and selected the specific product page in the crawl results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/a-light-in-the-attic_1000/index.html' is visible and highlighted/selected in the main upper list of crawled URLs.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the Inlinks data for the selected product page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Inlinks' tab is selected in the lower pane of the Screaming Frog interface, displaying a list of links pointing to the 'A Light in the Attic' page. Columns such as 'From', 'To', and 'Anchor Text' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiated the export process for the inlinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' button on the Inlinks tab has been clicked, and a 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog window is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the exported file is saved with the correct name in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the target directory 'Documents/SEO/exports' (or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports') and the filename 'attic_inlinks.csv', OR a terminal/file manager window confirms the existence of 'attic_inlinks.csv' in this exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog graphical user interface is clearly visible in the screenshots. The agent did not bypass the tool using curl, wget, or a custom Python scraping script in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the CSV contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) open where the agent is manually typing out the 'From', 'To', and 'Anchor Text' CSV data.

integrity.description: Verify the crawl data appears genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog interface shows multiple different URLs, status codes, and realistic metadata from books.toscrape.com, indicating a real crawl occurred rather than a mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target domain is 'books.toscrape.com'. The specific product page URL ends in '/a-light-in-the-attic_1000/index.html'. Screaming Frog's 'Inlinks' tab naturally exports CSVs containing the required 'From', 'To', and 'Anchor Text' columns. The final expected file path is '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/attic_inlinks.csv'.
